Package org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent

Interface AgentRequest

All Superinterfaces:
ConnectorRequest<AgentResponse>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AgentRequestImpl
public interface AgentRequest extends ConnectorRequest<AgentResponse>
Request interface for the LangChain4j agent connector.

Instances are obtained via Connector.createRequest() and configure the LLM agent that will be invoked when ConnectorRequest.execute() is called.

  • Method Details

    • agentName

      AgentRequest agentName(String agentName)

    • agentDescription

      AgentRequest agentDescription(String agentDescription)

    • instruction

      AgentRequest instruction(String instruction)

    • instructionMode

      AgentRequest instructionMode(String instructionMode)
      Optional. Controls how instruction(String) is combined with the bundled default system prompt. See AgentConnector.PARAM_NAME_INSTRUCTION_MODE for allowed values.

    • model

      AgentRequest model(String model)

    • message

      AgentRequest message(String message)

    • toolClasses

      AgentRequest toolClasses(String toolClasses)
      Registers tool classes for this request.
      Parameters:
      toolClasses - comma-separated list of fully qualified class names

    • apiKey

      AgentRequest apiKey(String apiKey)

    • baseUrl

      AgentRequest baseUrl(String baseUrl)
      Optional. OpenAI-compatible base URL. When omitted the value is resolved from the OPENAI_BASE_URL environment variable, falling back to the standard OpenAI API endpoint. Examples: Ollama (http://localhost:11434/v1), Azure OpenAI, OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai/api/v1).

    • customHeaders

      AgentRequest customHeaders(String customHeaders)
      Optional. Custom HTTP headers attached to every OpenAI-compatible request, encoded as a JSON object of String → String pairs.

    • mcpServers

      AgentRequest mcpServers(String mcpServers)
      Optional. JSON array describing one or more MCP servers with per-server custom headers. See AgentConnector.PARAM_NAME_MCP_SERVERS for the expected shape.

    • reasoningEffort

      AgentRequest reasoningEffort(String reasoningEffort)
      Optional. Reasoning effort hint (e.g. "low", "medium", "high"). Values are model-dependent.

    • reasoningSummary

      AgentRequest reasoningSummary(String reasoningSummary)
      Optional. Enables a reasoning summary in AiMessage.thinking() (e.g. "auto"). Setting this value switches to the OpenAI Responses API.

    • useChatMemory

      AgentRequest useChatMemory(boolean useChatMemory)
      Enables or disables chat memory for this invocation. When enabled, the agent's prior messages are loaded from AgentChatMemoryStore keyed by memoryId(String) and the new exchange is appended.

    • memoryId

      AgentRequest memoryId(String memoryId)
      Optional. Memory identifier to reuse across invocations. When unset and useChatMemory(boolean) is true, the connector generates a new UUID on first call.

    • chatMemoryMaxMessages

      AgentRequest chatMemoryMaxMessages(int chatMemoryMaxMessages)
      Sliding-window size (max messages retained) for the chat memory.

    • persistChatLog

      AgentRequest persistChatLog(Boolean persistChatLog)
      Per-activity override for the chat-log audit variable. See AgentConnector.PARAM_NAME_PERSIST_CHAT_LOG. Pass null to defer to the deployment-wide default.

    • pgHost

      AgentRequest pgHost(String pgHost)
      PostgreSQL host — when set, RAG is activated using pgvector.

    • pgPort

      AgentRequest pgPort(String pgPort)

    • pgDatabase

      AgentRequest pgDatabase(String pgDatabase)

    • pgUser

      AgentRequest pgUser(String pgUser)

    • pgPassword

      AgentRequest pgPassword(String pgPassword)

    • pgTable

      AgentRequest pgTable(String pgTable)

    • maxRagResults

      AgentRequest maxRagResults(int maxRagResults)

    • minRagScore

      AgentRequest minRagScore(double minRagScore)

    • embeddingDimension

      AgentRequest embeddingDimension(int embeddingDimension)

    • embeddingModelName

      AgentRequest embeddingModelName(String embeddingModelName)

    • getChatMemoryMaxMessages

    • getPersistChatLog

      Boolean getPersistChatLog()
      Per-activity override for the chat-log audit variable. Returns null when unset (caller must fall through to the deployment-wide resolver — typically AgentChatListener.isChatLogVariableEnabled()).
